summary: Current-head tests pass, but two promised persistence and CLI failure surfaces are not yet demonstrated with exact artifact assertions and Spec anchors.

findings.detail: The INV-004 Gate test checks only status in source-fallback mode. It must assert blocked authority and mirror bytes remain unchanged, a ready Gate appends exactly one validated pr_ready transition, both copies agree, and the anchor is registered in the Spec.

The S-008 partial-bootstrap test is service-level only. It must cover human and JSON exit-2 legacy artifact and cause details, preserved legacy bytes, absent Run and mirror, lock release, the subsequent worktree_unavailable result, and register the anchor in the Spec.
